description: The 981 most-used French verbs, ranked by usage, for the etymology pipeline (see etymology-pipeline.md). Generated from Conjuguer/Models/frequencies.xml (document order = usage order) filtered to -er/-ir/-re infinitives present in Conjuguer/Models/verbs.xml, deduplicated. `gloss` is the verb's English translation(s) from verbs.xml — a few verbs (e.g. sortir, saillir) carry two entries for their two conjugation patterns, whose distinct glosses are joined with '; '. One etymology per infinitif covers both patterns. Note: this list includes sortir (rank 56), which the app's FrequencyParser drops via a special-case skip.

direct (a movie), fulfill (a dream), perform (activities), finish making, carry out, make, realize (make real), realize (become aware)
pose, ask (a question), put down, stop carrying
safeguard, protect, save (on a computer), back up (computer data)

leave, quit, discharge somebody from an obligation
